hand.title: Daily Hand

events.text: You raised before the cards were dealt. Your opponent called.
Turn — 8. You checked. Your opponent bet — bigger than expected.

wrongReasons: 5 7 has similar strength, but look at when the aggression shifted — the turn card connects with the correct hand in a way it doesn't connect with 5 7.
K 8 makes a full house here — a hand that strong would have raised earlier and pushed harder for maximum value. The measured sizing in this hand points to something weaker.
9 9 has similar strength, but look at when the aggression shifted — the turn card connects with the correct hand in a way it doesn't connect with 9 9.
hand.explanation:
Answer: 6 10

Your opponent called the flop with one pair, then picked up two pair on the turn. The sudden aggression on the turn — after passivity on the flop — is the tell: they improved and immediately started building the pot.
